hints.text: British Overseas Territory east of the Falklands — **counts as UK** in streaks; only a few **Gen3 trekkers** (1 in Grytviken + 3 in isolated fjords), none on streets → memorise them
**Grytviken** = the ONLY pinpointable trekker (appears in A Community World): abandoned **rusted whaling machinery** + a church & white-painted wooden buildings
West side of the island: wide open **valley w/ lightly snow-capped mountains**
**Prion Island**: wooden walkway + lush green plants + many **seals**; **Hercules Bay boat trekker** = man in a red jacket + the MS National Geographic Explorer in the background
hints.uniq_note: The Nat-Geo-Explorer also appears at the Falklands' West Point boat trekker — red jacket + seals → South Georgia.

shared_with.note: The same expedition ship appears in the West Point Bay trekker there.
